_comment: Official LaunchDarkly MCP server (@launchdarkly/mcp-server), local stdio. Read-only is enforced by (1) the --scope read flag and (2) a READER-role API token — writes are 403'd at the LaunchDarkly API (see SETUP.md). Provide LAUNCHDARKLY_API_KEY (a Reader-role token) via the environment, never committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
